text.title: Agent Dev Tuning for VPS Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules every application of `Agent Dev Tuning for VPS` must enforce. Each rule pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Set `fs.inotify.max_user_watches = 524288` as the first tuning step. Defaults (65536 or 8192) are exhausted on large workspaces. Missing setting = REJECT.
rule.rationale: Claude Code creates one watch per tracked file; a 50k-file repo with worktrees exceeds defaults immediately. The 'ENOSPC' error is misleading — disk is fine, the watch table is full.

rule.statement: Set `nofile` to 65535 (soft) and 131072 (hard) for the agent user in `/etc/security/limits.d/`. Default soft (1024) is hit during workspace indexing.
rule.rationale: MCP servers + indexer + subprocesses open thousands of FDs together; PAM gates every process started in the user's session, including systemd user services.

rule.statement: Create a 4-8 GB swap file with `vm.swappiness=10` on any server running LLM API calls. LLM response processing spikes RAM transiently; without swap, OOM-kill fires.
rule.rationale: A 100MB JSON tree from a large LLM response is a transient spike. Without swap the kernel OOM-kills; with 4 GB swap + swappiness=10 the spike lands in swap and the process completes normally.

rule.statement: Enable `loginctl enable-linger <user>` so tmux + systemd user services survive SSH disconnects. Missing linger = REJECT for any agent workload that must persist.
rule.rationale: When SSH disconnects, the login session ends and SIGHUP fires. Linger keeps a persistent user session alive, so tmux survives without screen/nohup workarounds.

rule.statement: Use `git worktree add` to give each parallel agent its own directory + branch. Never run two agents on the same branch simultaneously.
rule.rationale: Worktrees share the object store but each has its own index and HEAD; two agents can stage and commit independently without locking or conflict.

rule.statement: When preconditions in `Applies If` fail OR any item in `Skip If` triggers, do not run this methodology. Document the skip rationale in the artefact's parent log.
rule.rationale: Misapplied methodologies are worse than no methodology — they consume cycles and produce false confidence.
